case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. GOLDEN PACIFIC CONSTR., INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN PACIFIC CONSTR., INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER OF THE DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS FOR ENTRY OF FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN PACIFIC CONSTR., INC. $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $14.37 INTEREST, $203.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $317.37, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $317.37, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS.
